steps.title: Identify the clue about why these artists are honored
steps.content: The passage says the fellowship was created to “honor” “exceptional” artists who “contributed so much to the arts.” These words point to positive accomplishments.

steps.title: Select the word for what you honor people for
steps.content:
The blank needs to name what exceptional artists are honored for — the passage says Williams was chosen because he "contributed so much to the arts." Substitute each choice:
  • Choice A — achievements: "honored for their achievements" — achievements means notable accomplishments, exactly what artistic contributions represent. ✓
  • Choice B — suspicious: "honored for their suspicious" — suspicious is an adjective, not a noun, and means causing distrust; it cannot complete this phrase. ✗
  • Choice C — assumptions: "honored for their assumptions" — assumptions means things taken for granted without proof, unrelated to artistic contribution. ✗
  • Choice D — predictions: "honored for their predictions" — predictions means forecasts about future events, not accomplishments in the arts. ✗
That matches choice A — A is correct.
